input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

[4-8] The scene shifts to a man in a red cap and navy shirt in a kitchen with white cabinets and a microwave. He raises his left index finger, then clasps his hands while smiling. An orange "QUICKIE" box is in the top right. [8-14] A lower-left graphic displays "TODAY'S RECIPE TAMARIND SALMON & CITRUS QUINOA" and "SALMÓN AL TAMARINDO CON QUINUA". The man gestures with open palms as the text and "QUICKIE" label remain visible.

[14-18] A man in a red cap and navy shirt stands in a kitchen, clasping his hands and gesturing while speaking. A white graphic in the lower left displays "TODAY'S RECIPE / TAMARIND SALMON & CITRUS QUINOA / SALMÓN AL TAMARINDO CON QUINUA" before fading to transparency. An orange "QUICKIE" label persists in the top right. [18-22] The view cuts to a close-up of the man, revealing a gold chain, as he looks right and smiles against a blurred kitchen background. [22-28] The shot returns to a medium view showing white cabinets and a microwave. The man gestures with both hands, then clasps them at his chest while smiling at the camera. He then unclasps his hands, raising them slightly with palms facing inward, maintaining his smile as the "QUICKIE" label remains fixed in the corner.

[28-38] A man wearing a red cap and navy shirt stands in a kitchen featuring white cabinets and a microwave. He smiles broadly, clasping and unclasping his hands near his chest while gesturing. The orange "QUICKIE" logo remains in the top right corner.
[38-40] The scene cuts to a close-up of a black skillet on a portable burner. A hand pours oil from a dark bottle into the pan. White text overlay reads "OLIVE OIL" and "ACEITE DE OLIVA".
[40-42] A hand tips minced garlic from a small glass bowl into the skillet containing oil, while another hand holds a wooden spoon. The text overlay changes to "GARLIC" and "AJO". The "QUICKIE" logo persists in the corner.

[42-46] A hand pours chopped red onion into a black skillet, labeled "RED ONION" and "CEBOLLA ROJA". A wooden spoon stirs the purple onions and minced garlic. [46-48] From a side angle, hands stir the sautéing mixture in the skillet on a burner. [48-52] A thick dark liquid is poured into the pan, identified as "TAMARIND PASTE" and "PASTA DE TAMARINDO". [52-56] "LITE SOY" and "SOJA BAJA EN SODIO" is poured in, followed by golden honey labeled "HONEY" and "MIEL" from a small glass bowl into the dark sauce mixture.

recent_thinks: [56-58] A hand tilts a small glass bowl to pour golden honey into the black skillet containing a dark sauce mixture with sautéed onions and garlic. White text overlay reading "HONEY" and "MIEL" appears centrally as the viscous liquid streams into the pan.

[58-60] A wooden spoon stirs the dark, glossy liquid mixture in the black skillet. Visible pieces of red onion and garlic are suspended in the thick, dark sauce. The spoon moves through the liquid, blending the ingredients together on the portable burner. The sauce appears to be thickening slightly as it is agitated.

queries.question: What color is the baseball cap worn by the man presenting the recipe? A. Blue B. Black C. Red D. White

The mixture, containing visible chopped red onions and garlic, bubbles gently as the spoon agitates the thick liquid, blending the ingredients together on the portable burner. The sauce appears glossy and coats the spoon as it moves through the pan.</think><answer></answer>
